name: Yunnan Nantian Electronics Information Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Nantian Electronics Information Co.,Ltd., an IT company, provides hardware and software products and solutions to banking/financial industry in China. It offers dot matrix printers; card readers, information interactive terminals, camera scanners, and other smart banking solutions; ribbon cartridges; mobile banking tablets, video teller machines, cashless ATMs, kiosk modules, card dispenser kiosks, and other self-services kiosks; thermal printers and modules; and spare parts. The company also provides data center services and integrated solutions; payment products and solutions to telecom operators, third-party payment providers, and financial institutions; software development and system integration services in the areas of utilities, water reservation system, telecommunications, scientific studies, government, authorities, and national defense; and consultancy and outsourcing services. Yunnan Nantian Electronics Information Co.,Ltd. is headquartered in Kunming, China.
